creator: freebsd@grem.de
text:
The port doesn't install the cleo icons, which are essential for task management in the leo editor.

Fix: 

Adjust the port, so it installs the directory. It might make sense to double check if other parts of the port are missing as well. 

I assume this involves changing Makefile (do-install target) and pkg-plist. No time here at the moment to provide a patch myself though.

As a workaround install files manually:

cd /usr/ports/editors/leo
sudo make extract
sudo cp -r work/Leo-4.10-final/leo/Icons/cleo /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/leo/Icons/.
How-To-Repeat: Install the port and e.g. assign a task priority to a leo node.
